zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Brechin於1303年出生在英國蘇格蘭安格斯布雷時，她的父親David de Brechin31歲，母親Lady Margaret de Bonkyl54歲。她於1330年之前與David Barclay結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1351年3月26日在蘇格蘭Forfarshire布雷享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Brechin于1303年出生在英国苏格兰安格斯布雷时，她的父亲David de Brechin31岁，母亲Lady Margaret de Bonkyl54岁。她于1330年之前与David Barclay结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1351年3月26日在苏格兰Forfarshire布雷享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brechin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the cathedral city of Brechin (Angus).

variants.name: Bricken
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeen): probably a variant of   Brechin  .
Americanized form of German Brücken, a cognate of Bruck .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Brechin was born in 1303, in Brechin, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, David de Brechin, was 31 and her mother, Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, was 54. She married David Barclay before 1330. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 26 March 1351, in Brechin, Forfarshire, Scotland, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Brechin est née en 1303, à Brechin, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, David de Brechin, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, avait 54 ans. Elle a épousé David Barclay avant 1330. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 mars 1351, à Brechin, Forfarshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Brechin 1303 in Brechin, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater David de Brechin 31 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret de Bonkyl 54. Sie hat vor 1330 David Barclay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. März 1351 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Brechin, Forfarshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Brechin è nata il nel 1303 nel Brechin, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, David de Brechin, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, aveva 54 anni. Lei sposato David Barclay prima del 1330. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 marzo 1351, nel Brechin, Forfarshire, Scotland, all'età di 48 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Brechin(이)가 1303년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 브레친에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David de Brechin(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret de Bonkyl(은)는 54세였다. 그녀는 1330년 이전 David Barclay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1351년 3월 26일 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 브레친에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Brechin родилась в 1303 г. в местности бречин, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени David de Brechin было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, 54. Она умерла 26 марта 1351 г. в местности бречин, Forfarshire, Шотландия в возрасте 48 лет.
